---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.page-hero}
# Resume

[A full record of my professional journey in nutrition, food service, and operations leadership.]{.page-subtitle}
:::

::: {.content-area}

::: {style="margin-bottom:2rem;"}
<a href="#" class="download-btn" onclick="window.print();return false;">⬇ Download / Print PDF</a>
:::

<!-- ── WORK EXPERIENCE ─────────────────────────────── -->

::: {.section-box}
::: {.resume-section}
## Work Experience

::: {.resume-item}
::: {}
::: {.resume-role}
Volunteer — Healthiest Babies Possible Program
:::
::: {.resume-org}
Vancouver Coastal Health (VCH), BC
:::
<ul class="resume-bullets">
<li>Supporting a VCH community nutrition program focused on maternal and infant health outcomes.</li>
<li>Assisting families in accessing nutrition guidance and resources during pregnancy and early infancy.</li>
</ul>
:::
::: {.resume-date}
March 2026 – Present
:::
:::

::: {.resume-item}
::: {}
::: {.resume-role}
Food Bank Volunteer
:::
::: {.resume-org}
Cityreach Care Society, Coquitlam, BC, Canada
:::
<ul class="resume-bullets">
<li>Performed food sorting, quality checking, and distribution to community families in need.</li>
<li>Applied food safety knowledge to ensure donated products met safe consumption standards.</li>
<li>Collaborated with a team of volunteers and staff to maintain an efficient, dignified service experience.</li>
</ul>
:::
::: {.resume-date}
July 2025 – February 2026
:::
:::

::: {.resume-item}
::: {}
::: {.resume-role}
Clinical Nutritionist — Independent Practice
:::
::: {.resume-org}
Brazil
:::
<ul class="resume-bullets">
<li>Provided personalised nutrition consultations across clinical, sports, and community settings.</li>
<li>Developed individualised meal plans addressing chronic disease, athletic performance, weight management, and maternal/paediatric nutrition.</li>
<li>Educated patients on allergen management, supplementation, and evidence-based dietary strategies.</li>
<li>Maintained patient records and ensured adherence to professional ethics standards (CFN/Brazil).</li>
</ul>
:::
::: {.resume-date}
2010 – 2024
:::
:::

::: {.resume-item}
::: {}
::: {.resume-role}
Operations Coordinator — Automatic Vending Machines
:::
::: {.resume-org}
Private Sector, São Paulo State, Brazil
:::
<ul class="resume-bullets">
<li>Managed end-to-end operations of a multi-location vending machine network, overseeing inventory, supplier negotiations, and quality compliance.</li>
<li>Implemented HACCP-aligned food safety protocols, reducing product non-conformance incidents by optimizing restocking schedules and product rotation.</li>
<li>Coordinated maintenance schedules and trained technicians on hygiene and safety standards, ensuring regulatory compliance across all sites.</li>
<li>Analysed sales data and customer feedback to optimise product assortment and maximise machine revenue.</li>
</ul>
:::
::: {.resume-date}
2010 – 2018
:::
:::

:::
:::

---

<!-- ── EDUCATION ───────────────────────────────────── -->

::: {.section-box}
::: {.resume-section}
## Education

::: {.resume-item}
::: {}
::: {.resume-role}
MBA — Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Leadership
:::
::: {.resume-org}
University Canada West, Vancouver, BC
:::
<ul class="resume-bullets">
<li>Focus areas: AI integration strategy, operations management, data-driven decision-making, and leadership.</li>
<li>Applying MBA competencies to food service operations and health-sector business development.</li>
</ul>
:::
::: {.resume-date}
Expected 2026
:::
:::

::: {.resume-item}
::: {}
::: {.resume-role}
Bachelor of Science — Nutrition
:::
::: {.resume-org}
Centro Universitário São Camilo, São Paulo, Brazil
:::
<ul class="resume-bullets">
<li>Clinical practicum: Human Milk Bank (Hospital Geral Vila Penteado) and Community School Clinic (PROMOVE).</li>
<li>Training in clinical assessment, dietary counselling, medical nutrition therapy, and public health nutrition.</li>
</ul>
:::
::: {.resume-date}
Graduated
:::
:::

::: {.resume-item}
::: {}
::: {.resume-role}
Diploma — Food Technology
:::
::: {.resume-org}
UNICAMP — Universidade Estadual de Campinas, Brazil
:::
<ul class="resume-bullets">
<li>Technical foundations in food science, processing, quality assurance, and food safety systems.</li>
</ul>
:::
::: {.resume-date}
Graduated
:::
:::

:::
:::

---

<!-- ── CERTIFICATIONS ──────────────────────────────── -->

::: {.section-box}
::: {.resume-section}
## Licences & Certifications

::: {.resume-item}
::: {}
::: {.resume-role}
FoodSafe Level 2
:::
::: {.resume-org}
BC Centre for Disease Control (BCCDC), Canada
:::
:::
::: {.resume-date}
Active
:::
:::

::: {.resume-item}
::: {}
::: {.resume-role}
Functional Sports Nutrition Certificate
:::
::: {.resume-org}
Faculty of Medical Sciences of Santa Casa de São Paulo,Brazil
:::
:::
::: {.resume-date}
Completed
:::
:::

::: {.resume-item}
::: {}
::: {.resume-role}
Industry Management Certificate
:::
::: {.resume-org}
University of São Paulo (USP), Brazil
:::
:::
::: {.resume-date}
Completed
:::
:::

:::
:::

---

<!-- ── SKILLS SUMMARY ──────────────────────────────── -->

::: {.section-box}
::: {.resume-section}
## Core Competencies

| Domain | Competencies |
|---|---|
| **Food Safety & Operations** | HACCP, Regulatory Compliance, Risk Management, Quality Assurance, FoodSafe L2 |
| **Nutrition Science** | Clinical Assessment, Sports Nutrition, NICU Support, Breastfeeding Guidance, Allergen Management |
| **Business & Leadership** | AI Integration Strategy, Operations Management, Staff Training, Performance Metrics |
| **Languages** | Portuguese (Native), English, Spanish |

:::
:::

---

::: {style="text-align:center;color:var(--light-mid);font-size:0.85rem;margin-top:1rem;"}
References available upon request. · [vasalga29\@gmail.com](mailto:vasalga29@gmail.com) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vanessamarques-nutrition-operations)
:::

:::
